name: Kikunojo (Reprint)
effect_text: [On K.O.] If your opponent has 3 or less Life cards, add up to 1 card from the top of your deck to the top of your Life cards.[Trigger] If your opponent has 3 or less Life cards, play this card.DISCLAIMER: This card is a reprint of the pre-existing card in the OP06 set. The main difference between this card and the original print is the inclusion of "EN" on the right side, by the copyright information.
